topClaims.text: Algorithmic chemistry never tried at GPT-2 scale or above until now
Anthropic-principle simulation approach finds shortest path from non-life to proto-life is not hard
Hyperon infrastructure ready for large-scale algorithmic chemistry experiments
Autocatalytic sets of thought patterns function as self-reinforcing belief systems or procedural networks
Morphic resonance plus anti-resonance makes autocatalytic sets healthier and more probable
Global manufacturing consumes approximately 220 EJ of energy annually
Global raw material extraction for manufacturing is approximately 90 billion tonnes annually
The document covers 15 primary industrial sectors from energy infrastructure through polymer manufacturing to energy-intensive unit operations
The global manufacturing workforce is approximately 1.2 billion persons
The report is designed to enable reconstruction of manufacturing capability from first principles on an independent location or planetary body

pages.title: Global Manufacturing Capacity: Complete Civilizational Record

topClaims.text: Bootstrap sequence (Chapter 28) provides a 6-phase build order from survival through advanced industry, spanning approximately 50-80 years to reach semiconductor fabrication capability
Contains [REBOOT NOTE] blocks providing bootstrap alternatives for independent location or planetary body scenarios, avoiding Earth's suboptimal decisions
Contains 20+ [SUBOPTIMAL] markers documenting major civilizational decision failures across energy, materials, supply chain, governance, and pollution domains
Covers 620 EJ/year primary energy consumption and approximately 90 billion tonnes/year raw material extraction as baseline Earth metrics
Phosphorus fertilizer section flagged as existential vulnerability given Morocco holds 73% of world phosphate reserves

pages.title: GitHub Trends May 2026: AI Agent Paradigm as Dominant Architecture
Peter Joseph Integral and Common Ground Teheno

topClaims.text: Competition is absent from the technical design of both systems — not regulated or disincentivised, but structurally eliminated

Integral is a federated post-monetary cooperative economy replacing market exchange, profit-driven production, and hierarchical governance with cybernetically coordinated commons-oriented labour reciprocity
Time credits function as non-transferable reputation-based ledgers, not currencies. Contribution value is determined by the cooperative or federation, not market willingness to pay
Common Ground uses public university as political feasibility anchor — leveraging existing government investment infrastructure without requiring administrative reform
AI feedback subsystems guide design optimisation and labour valuation dynamically based on real-time demand, skill specificity, and sustainability priorities

pages.title: Knowledge Work and Physical Production: Systemic Interdependence

topClaims.text: Physical labor and knowledge work form a coupled production system — neither is sufficient alone
The 'real vs fake' work dichotomy is a category error — both functions are real and interdependent
Knowledge work functions as a productivity multiplier on physical labor — orders of magnitude efficiency difference
Mature coordination infrastructure reaches criticality — society cannot function without it at scale
Four nations have grand strategies that drive WWIII geopolitics: USA (Greater North America / Technate), Russia (Third Rome), Iran (Shia Exceptionalism), Israel (Greater Israel)
Grand strategy is a manifestation of political system and cultural tradition, not a rational choice; each nation's strategy is internally coherent but mutually exclusive
Iran will not surrender regardless of material disadvantage because of Zoroastrian eschatology and Shia martyrdom traditions
Israel's Kabbalah-based worldview holds that accelerating evil is the path to redemption — opposite of Russia's resistance-to-evil tradition
The chess metaphor (king=political system, queen=grand strategy, bishop/knight/rook=attack vectors, pawns=sacrificial tools) maps each nation's structure
Fractality provides a sound scaling pattern for multi-level commons governance
Timewave Zero is not falsifiable and must not be used as a planning assumption
Toroidal dynamics is a grounded design pattern for resource loops in regenerative communities
Four Distinctions framework (Needs/Beliefs/Principles/Values) must be adopted in DAO governance onboarding
Egregore theology may be used as narrative identity layer but must connect to measurable FOT indicators
Agent skills are reusable tool/action modules that AI agents use to extend their capabilities
AI agents are the dominant paradigm shift in GitHub trending repositories as of May 2026
Bootstrap planning begins from first principles to design minimal viable industrial capability for a community
Industrial capacity refers to the total manufacturing output, workforce, energy consumption, and raw material throughput of a defined industrial system
Mature technologies reach infrastructure criticality — society cannot function without them at scale
MCP is the critical infrastructure protocol for AI agent tool integration
Elinor Ostrom documented 8 principles for successful commons self-governance
Common Ground (Teheno) project applies Ostrom principles at community scale in Brazil
Regenerative technology encompasses systems and infrastructure designed to restore, sustain, and enhance ecological and social systems rather than merely minimizing harm
Meme Influence Score algorithm is undefined — Egregore simulation cannot run without it
SBNFT (§59) + PoR verification (§62) are the backbone components of the MST-Polcompball/EcoFutura stack
Strongest chapters: §59 (SBNFT), §62 (Biome Verification), §69 (Reversing Incentives), §85 (First Nations DAO), §74 (Watershed Governance)
Critical gap: no bridge between governance spec and existing live community projects (Holos, EcoHubs, Phoenix Farms)
Most realistic US entry point: Green Bonds + Proof-of-Regeneration for soil carbon (farmers, concrete metrics, low political friction)
